item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 35min Ive been using the modified Rich Hill trade value chart when more realistically evaluating NFL dr
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 35min Ive been using the modified Rich Hill trade value chart when more realistically evaluating NFL draft day trades. More modern JJ chart. There are def other really good ones too. But just created an easy app if you want to test potential draft pick trades using RH Mostrar más 3 2 mil
